subject: Fabletics - need everything
body:
Hey Richard,

We have a big opportunity with Fabletics (fabletics.com). They want to see everything you've got — demo, CX intel, pitch deck, the works.

Contact: Mark Chen, SVP Operations. They're focused on subscription management and customer retention. Pain points: high churn rate, inconsistent service across channels. Running on Five9 with Zendesk.

Can you turn this around in 48 hours?

Kojo
